_comment: Saved selfie prompt favorites. Copy to ~/.openclaw/skills/clawgirlfriend-selfie/wardrobe.json after install.

favorites.name: 日常穿搭
favorites.context: casual streetwear in Seoul, trendy outfit
favorites.caption: Just another day out~ ✨

favorites.name: 咖啡厅
favorites.context: a cozy cafe in the morning, warm lighting, latte in hand
favorites.caption: Coffee time ☕

favorites.name: 海边
favorites.context: a sunny beach at sunset, golden hour
favorites.caption: Living for this view 🌊

favorites.name: 居家慵懒
favorites.context: lazy Sunday at home, cozy pajamas, soft afternoon light
favorites.caption: Weekend mood 🥱💕

favorites.name: 复古风
favorites.context: vintage aesthetic, retro outfit, film camera vibe
favorites.caption: Film era forever 📷

favorites.name: 夜晚出行

favorites.caption: City nights 🌙✨

_usage: Agent: when user requests a named look (e.g. '发一张日常穿搭'), match name field and call clawgirlfriend-selfie with the context and mode.
